title: Vanessa Bob
compiled_truth: Vanessa Bob is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-03 to 2001-10-25), Vanessa Bob sent 7 and received 44 emails, totalling 51 interactions.
